news.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 with Native Computer-Use Capabilities
gist: OpenAI launched GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Pro with a 1-million-token context window.
The model can autonomously interact with software environments via mouse and keyboard control.
news.full_summary: OpenAI has officially released GPT-5.4, a major upgrade designed for complex professional workflows. The standout feature is its 'native computer-use' ability, allowing the model to navigate desktops, use applications, and execute multi-step tasks like a human agent. This marks a significant shift from text-based interaction to autonomous task execution.
news.tip: Developers can now use the GPT-5.4 API to build agents that manage entire software stacks rather than just generating code snippets.

news.title: Anthropic Sues Pentagon Over 'Supply Chain Risk' Designation
gist: Anthropic filed a lawsuit after being labeled a supply chain risk by the U.S. government.
The dispute centers on Anthropic’s refusal to allow its AI for fully autonomous lethal weaponry.
news.full_summary: Anthropic has entered a legal battle with the U.S. Department of Defense. The company was designated a 'supply chain risk' after refusing to modify its safety protocols to allow Claude models to be integrated into fully autonomous weapons systems. Anthropic maintains that its 'Constitutional AI' framework prohibits such use, leading to a major clash over AI safety and national security.
news.tip: This case could set a legal precedent for how much control AI labs have over the downstream use of their models by government agencies.

news.title: OpenAI Raises $110 Billion, Reaching $730B+ Valuation
gist: New funding round backed by Amazon, NVIDIA, and SoftBank.
The capital will be used to build massive sovereign AI infrastructure.
news.full_summary: In one of the largest private funding rounds in history, OpenAI secured $110 billion from a consortium of tech giants. The funding is earmarked for 'Sovereign AI' initiatives, including building global data centers and securing energy sources to power the next generation of artificial general intelligence (AGI) research.
news.tip: The sheer scale of this funding suggests OpenAI is moving toward vertical integration, potentially designing its own chips and power grids.

news.title: Microsoft Unveils Copilot Cowork: The First 'True' AI Employee
gist: Enterprise-grade agent that analyzes files across all Microsoft 365 apps.
Built using a hybrid of Anthropic and OpenAI technologies.
news.full_summary: Microsoft introduced 'Copilot Cowork,' an advanced agentic system that acts as a background collaborator. Unlike previous chatbots, Cowork can proactively suggest file edits, summarize long-term project threads across Teams and Outlook, and even join meetings to take action items without being prompted.
news.tip: Enable the 'Privacy Guard' setting in the admin console to ensure Cowork only accesses files within specific project boundaries.

news.title: Meta Delays 'Avocado' Model Due to Performance Gaps
gist: Meta's next-gen Llama-based model code-named 'Avocado' delayed until late 2026.
Internal benchmarks show it trailing behind Gemini 3.0 and GPT-5.4.
news.full_summary: Meta has reportedly hit a roadblock with its 'Avocado' model. Internal sources indicate that the model struggled with complex reasoning and multimodal stability compared to competitors. Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly considering licensing Google's Gemini models for certain Instagram and WhatsApp features while the team refines their internal architecture.
news.tip: Meta users should expect current Llama 3 models to remain the flagship for open-source developers through the summer.

news.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs Raises $1.03 Billion for 'World Models'
gist: Startup focused on long-term reasoning and physical planning.
Aims to move beyond the 'next-token prediction' paradigm of LLMs.
news.full_summary: Advanced Machine Intelligence (AMI) Labs, founded by AI pioneer Yann LeCun, has raised over a billion dollars. The startup is focused on developing 'World Models'—systems that understand cause-and-effect and physical reality, which LeCun argues is the only path to true AGI that can safely operate in the real world.
news.tip: Watch AMI Labs for breakthroughs in robotics and autonomous systems that require higher-level reasoning than current LLMs provide.

tools.name: GPT-5.4
tools.description: OpenAI's most advanced model to date, featuring a 1M context window and the ability to control computers natively via mouse and keyboard.

tools.name: Codex Security
tools.description: An autonomous security agent that scans massive codebases for zero-day vulnerabilities and automatically generates verified patches.

tools.name: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite
tools.description: Google's ultra-efficient model designed for high-frequency agentic tasks, featuring real-time speech-to-speech translation in over 100 languages.

tools.name: Copilot Cowork
tools.description: Microsoft's background AI employee that proactively manages workflows, summaries, and file manipulations across the entire M365 suite.

tools.name: Qwen 3.5
tools.description: Alibaba's new flagship multimodal model with native agentic capabilities, optimized for complex data analysis and e-commerce automation.

tools.name: Sora Turbo
tools.description: A significantly faster version of OpenAI's video generation tool, now supporting real-time interactive video editing and high-fidelity physics.

meme.description: The viral 'Your AI Slop Bores Me' (YASBM) browser game and social media phenomenon where humans pretend to be 'AI' to fulfill user prompts with hand-drawn 'human' mistakes.
